message.content:
Explore the current state of the Rearden monorepo at C:/Users/yakik/Documents/projects/rearden. I need to understand:

1. The full file tree of apps/web/ - every file and directory
2. The full file tree of apps/api/ - every file and directory
3. The full file tree of packages/types/src/ - all type definitions
4. Read the content of: apps/web/package.json, apps/web/vite.config.ts, apps/web/src/App.tsx, apps/web/src/main.tsx, apps/web/src/styles/global.scss
5. Read the content of: apps/api/package.json, apps/api/src/app.ts, apps/api/src/index.ts
6. Read the content of: packages/types/src/index.ts, packages/types/src/user.ts, packages/types/src/candidate.ts, packages/types/src/recruiter.ts, packages/types/src/api-response.ts
7. Read root package.json and turbo.json

Be thorough - read every file mentioned above and report their full contents.
